basic_details.job_title: ESIC Beltola Tutor/ Demonstrator Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Employees State Insurance Corporation Beltola (ESIC Beltola) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 4 Tutor/ Demonstrator Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the ESIC Beltola office with original documents and self-attested copies.

qualification.education_qualification: As per NMC guidelines as stipulated in Gazette Notification
qualification.details: Tutor/ Demonstrator (Anatomy): As per NMC guidelines as stipulated in Gazette Notification Tutor/ Demonstrator (Microbiology): As per NMC guidelines as stipulated in Gazette Notification Tutor/ Demonstrator (Pathology): As per NMC guidelines as stipulated in Gazette Notification

salary_details.details: Tutor/ Demonstrator (Anatomy): Fixed Basic Pay of Rs. 56,100/- (Level 10) + Other Allowances Tutor/ Demonstrator (Microbiology): Fixed Basic Pay of Rs. 56,100/- (Level 10) + Other Allowances Tutor/ Demonstrator (Pathology): Fixed Basic Pay of Rs. 56,100/- (Level 10) + Other Allowances

content_sections.heading: ESIC Beltola Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ESIC Beltola Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ESIC Beltola Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ESIC Beltola Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Tutor/ Demonstrator (Anatomy): As per NMC guidelines as stipulated in Gazette Notification Tutor/ Demonstrator (Microbiology): As per NMC guidelines as stipulated in Gazette Notification Tutor/ Demonstrator (Pathology): As per NMC guidelines as stipulated in Gazette Notification

content_sections.heading: ESIC Beltola Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Tutor/ Demonstrator (Anatomy): Fixed Basic Pay of Rs. 56,100/- (Level 10) + Other Allowances Tutor/ Demonstrator (Microbiology): Fixed Basic Pay of Rs. 56,100/- (Level 10) + Other Allowances Tutor/ Demonstrator (Pathology): Fixed Basic Pay of Rs. 56,100/- (Level 10) + Other Allowances

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Beltola?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Tutor/ Demonstrator posts at ESIC Beltola is scheduled for 09 July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by ESIC Beltola?
faq.answer: ESIC Beltola has released a total of 4 vacancies for the Tutor/ Demonstrator positions across various departments like Anatomy, Microbiology, and Pathology.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Tutor/ Demonstrator posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Tutor/ Demonstrator posts is 45 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Tutor/ Demonstrator positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the Tutor/ Demonstrator posts ranges from Rs. 56,100 to Rs. 117,585 per month, with a fixed basic pay of Rs. 56,100/- (Level 10) plus other allowances.

faq.question: Q5. What is the qualification required for the Tutor/ Demonstrator posts?
faq.answer: The qualification required for these posts is as per the National Medical Commission (NMC) guidelines, as stipulated in the Gazette Notification.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the ESIC Beltola Tutor/ Demonstrator recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Eligible candidates need to attend the walk-in interview at the ESIC Beltola office with all required original documents and self-attested copies.

faq.question: Q7. What are the important documents to carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the ESIC Beltola recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Document Verification followed by a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the ESIC Beltola office located?
faq.answer: The ESIC Beltola office is located in Guwahati, Assam, with a pincode of 781022. The exact address for the walk-in interview will be in the official notification.
